login.title: Login to Your Account
login.description: Enter your credentials to access the admin panel.

errorMessage.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

errorMessage.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errorMessage.maxLength: Password must be less than 100 characters
errorMessage.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errorMessage.lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
errorMessage.number: Password must contain at least one number

INVALID_CREDENTIALS.title: Invalid Credentials
INVALID_CREDENTIALS.message: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.

UNKNOWN_ERROR.title: Unknown Error
UNKNOWN_ERROR.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

modal.title: Sign Out?
modal.description: You will need to log in again to access the admin panel.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back, {name}! Here is a look at your current portfolio's status.

profile.title: Profile
profile.welcome: Manage your public presence and professional identity.

upload.title: Upload Avatar
upload.description: Select an image to upload as your new avatar. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF.

submit.error: Failed to update avatar. Please try again.

delete.title: Remove Avatar?
delete.description: This will permanently delete your current profile photo. You can upload a new one at any time.

submit.error: Failed to remove avatar. Please try again.

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.description: Update your personal details and public profile.

errorMessage.maxLength: Name must be less than 100 characters
Title must be less than 200 characters

email.label: Email
email.helper: This will be used for sign in.

errorMessage.invalid: Must be a valid email address

about.title: About & Bio
about.description: Describe who you are, what you do, and the experience you bring.

bio.label: Short Bio
bio.helper: Shown in project cards and featured sections.

errorMessage.maxLength: Short bio must be less than 300 characters

about.label: Detailed About
about.placeholder: A more detailed description of your background, skills, and experience.

errorMessage.maxLength: About section must be less than 2000 characters

socialLinks.title: Presence & Contacts
socialLinks.description: Add links and details so people can find you and your work online.

errorMessage.maxLength: Location must be less than 100 characters

error.invalidForm: Please correct the errors in the form and try again.
error.USER_NOT_FOUND: User not found. Please refresh the page and try again.
error.DB_UPDATE_FAILED: An error occurred while updating your profile. Please try again later.
error.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

projects.title: Projects
projects.welcome: Manage your portfolio projects. Add, edit, or remove projects to showcase your work.

list.emptyDescription: Get started by creating your first project.
